FedRAMP Advisory Services | Digital Forensics .company <

Navigate the Federal Cloud Authorization Process

FedRAMP requires a systematic approach to security documentation, control implementation, and third-party assessment. Organizations that attempt this without experienced guidance frequently encounter costly delays, scope creep, and failed assessments.

Advisory Services

  • FedRAMP readiness assessment and gap analysis
  • System Security Plan (SSP) development
  • Security control implementation guidance
  • 3PAO assessment preparation and coordination
  • Agency sponsorship identification and engagement
  • Plan of Action & Milestones (POA&M) management
  • Continuous monitoring program design
  • Annual assessment preparation
  • ConMon reporting and documentation

FedRAMP Authorization Paths

We advise on both Joint Authorization Board (JAB) and Agency authorization paths, helping you select the approach that aligns with your business strategy, timeline, and target agency relationships.

>

Federal Compliance
Advisory>FedRAMP
AdvisoryAdvisory>

HEROFedRAMP authorization support for cloud service providers. ATO preparation, security assessment, continuous monitoring, and agency sponsorship guidance.

Navigate the Federal Cloud Authorization Process

FedRAMP requires a systematic approach to security documentation, control implementation, and third-party assessment. Organizations that attempt this without experienced guidance frequently encounter costly delays, scope creep, and failed assessments.

Advisory Services

  • FedRAMP readiness assessment and gap analysis
  • System Security Plan (SSP) development
  • Security control implementation guidance
  • 3PAO assessment preparation and coordination
  • Agency sponsorship identification and engagement
  • Plan of Action & Milestones (POA&M) management
  • Continuous monitoring program design
  • Annual assessment preparation
  • ConMon reporting and documentation

FedRAMP Authorization Paths

We advise on both Joint Authorization Board (JAB) and Agency authorization paths, helping you select the approach that aligns with your business strategy, timeline, and target agency relationships.

FedRAMP Phases

  • Readiness Assessment
  • SSP Development
  • 3PAO Coordination
  • ATO Achievement
  • Continuous Monitoring

FedRAMP requires a systematic approach to security documentation, control implementation, and third-party assessment. Organizations that attempt this without experienced guidance frequently encounter costly delays, scope creep, and failed assessments.

  • System Security Plan (SSP) development

  • Agency sponsorship identification and engagement
